rules.rule_text:
rule ClientMesh
{
	meta:
		author = "Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/06"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/ClientMesh"
		family = "torct"

	strings:
		$string1 = "machinedetails"
		$string2 = "MySettings"
		$string3 = "sendftppasswords"
		$string4 = "sendbrowserpasswords"
		$string5 = "arma2keyMass"
		$string6 = "keylogger"

	condition:
		all of them
}
